excerpt: START DATE: Tuesday August 25th Anki: Weekly tagged SGU Zanki deck will be on drive This module is a TANK. Stay on track, watch pixorize every single day. Sketchy has released a biochem section, I have not used it. But I’m sure it’s excellent. Please consider using it Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun Week 1 ER Exam #1 Glycolysis #2 GI Embryology DLA post lecture 1 A&B #3 GI Embryology #4 PDH and TCA Cycle DLA post lecture 1C #5 Anatomy (Peritoneum) #6 ETC and Oxidative Phosphorylation DLA #7 Anatomy (Stomach/Small Intestine) #8 Gluconeogenesis DLA Review lecture 1-4 +half of DLA Review lecture 5-8 +half of DLAs Videos Take the day off, catch up on the weekend B&B biochem: 2.1 glucose, 2.2 glycolysis Pixorize: pyruva

excerpt: START DATE: 10/20/20 Psych is traditionally easier for the average person, use this time to review term 1 material, especially FTM, followed by CPR and MSK 20 day schedule for BSCE 1 if you havn’t started yet. Try and do all biochem RX questions before the BSCE exam. Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun Week 1 (week 15) #57 Emotions #58 Intro to Psychopathology and Anxiety Disorders #59 OCD and Somatic Symptom Disorders #60 Trauma Disorders #61 Depressive and Bipolar Disorders #62 Biological Rhythms #63 Sleep #64 Sleep Disorders Do Tuesdays lectures (57,58), review thursday’s (61,62) Do wednesdays lectures(59,60), review friday’s (63,64) Boards and Beyond Videos (Psychiatry section) Exam 4 Honestly, take Tues & weds off
